caption: A group of men walk through an indoor transportation terminal toward a white bus featuring the "Real Madrid" logo. Several men wear light-colored polo shirts, dark trousers, and athletic shoes, while others are dressed in formal dark suits and ties. One man in a suit walks prominently toward the foreground, wearing a black face mask. In the background, other individuals in dark clothing stand near the entrance of the vehicle. The setting includes red structural columns and a grey floor. As the scene progresses, the men move forward; those in polos walk toward the right, and the man in the suit continues his stride toward the left side of the frame. A black stanchion with a retractable belt is positioned in the middle of the walkway, which the men pass as they traverse the terminal.
